nasb.text: Looking up, they *saw that the stone had been rolled away, although it was extremely large.

esv.text: And looking up, they saw that the stone had been rolled back—it was very large.

cnv.text: 原來那塊石頭非常大，她們抬頭一看，卻見石頭已經輥開了。

ccb.text: 她们抬头一看，那块大石头已经滚到一旁。

csbs.text: 原来那块石头非常大。可是她们抬头一看，见石头已经被滚开了。
